name: builtwith
dockerfile:
FROM node:20-slim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and install dependencies
COPY shared/modules/tools/osint/builtwith/package.json ./package.json
RUN npm install

# Copy the MCP server file
COPY shared/modules/tools/osint/builtwith/bw-mcp-v1.js ./bw-mcp-v1.js

# Run the MCP server
ENTRYPOINT ["node", "bw-mcp-v1.js"]
description: MCP BuiltWith Server - Identify technology stack behind websites using BuiltWith API. Provides domain lookup to discover frameworks, analytics tools, hosting services, and more.
